title: claude-ads user profile
description: Shape of ~/.claude-ads/profile.json — persistent per-user context, platform connection state, and preferences. Read by every /ads command so the user never re-types their context. Written by /ads start and /ads start edit.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking shape changes.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp profile was first initialized.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent write.

context.description: Business context. Asked once during /ads start, reused on every audit / plan / creative run.

monthly_spend_usd.description: Approximate USD monthly ad spend across all platforms combined.

connections.description: Per-platform connection state. Populated by /ads start's per-platform wizard.

zernio.description: Zernio publishing state (for /ads publish). Optional — only set if user opts in.

api_key_present.description: True if ZERNIO_API_KEY env var is set. The key itself is NEVER stored in the profile.

tier.description: Which Capa (tier) the user is using for this platform. mcp_* values reflect the specific community MCP server picked.

ad_account_id.description: Platform-native account ID (e.g., act_123456789 for Meta, 123-456-7890 for Google, 7234... for TikTok).

last_verified_at.description: Most recent successful test-call timestamp. /ads start sets this after each verification step.
